amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 47 — paragraph 5
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 47 — paragraph 5

## Text proposed by the Commission

5. If the authorisation is considered unjustified, this shall be withdrawn by the market surveillance authority of the Member State concerned.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

5. If the authorisation is considered unjustified, this shall be withdrawn by the national supervisory authority of the Member State concerned;
commission_text: 5. If the authorisation is considered unjustified, this shall be withdrawn by the market surveillance authority of the Member State concerned.
parliament_text: 5. If the authorisation is considered unjustified, this shall be withdrawn by the national supervisory authority of the Member State concerned;
